theme_notes: Today's touchstones: the 2026 Met Gala (Beyoncé co-chair, Sam Smith's 52-lb look, Sabrina Carpenter), the Baldoni-Lively lawsuit settlement, and the UCL semi-finals (Bayern fly to Paris tomorrow needing 4 goals, Arsenal host Atletico). Also riffing on Spirit Airlines' collapse, Trump's 25% EU car tariffs, and the ongoing US-Iran war and Strait of Hormuz chaos.
settled: Blake and Justin settled their legal war. So did you. Both feel hollow.
Balanced, like the Strait of Hormuz on a good day. Cherish this.
Spirit Airlines is gone. Your debt is gone. One of these was your choice.
youOwe: Less than a Met Gala coat check. You are technically winning.
Less than Trump's EU tariff on one bolt. Still embarrassing.
Spirit was charging more for a carry-on. They went bankrupt. Consider the data.
A Strait of Hormuz detour surcharge on one pallet. Pay your surcharge.
Not enough for a nosebleed seat at the UCL final in Budapest. Pay faster.
The Met Gala doorman has seen worse. He is still judging.
Bayern fly to Paris tomorrow needing 4 goals. You just need to pay one debt.
Sam Smith wore 52 pounds of costume to the Met Gala. You're carrying similar weight.
Trump tariffed EU cars at 25%. You're taxing this relationship at similar rates.
Enough to reroute a shipping container around Iran. Just Venmo instead.
Baldoni's lawyers billed more per hour. You don't have their credentials.
Arsenal went 13 games unbeaten across Europe. You went this long without paying.
Beyoncé co-chaired the Met Gala tonight. She has been briefed on your balance.
That's enough to launch a personal trade war. Which is, functionally, what's happening.
Spirit employed 17,000 people before collapsing. Your partner is studying the playbook.
Spirit Airlines collapsed with more dignity than your debt timeline.
The Pentagon deployed over the Iran war. Your partner deployed a spreadsheet.
The UCL final is in Budapest on May 30. Your finances will not make it.
theyOwe: Less than Sabrina Carpenter spent on concealer for the Met Gala. Collect it.
Spirit's bankruptcy filing listed this as a rounding error. It is not a rounding error.
EU tariff on one imported button. Trump would not let it slide. Neither should you.
The Hormuz detour adds this per ton to global shipping. The principle is the same.
Sam Smith's Met Gala outfit cost more per square inch. Scale accordingly.
Blake Lively settled for undisclosed millions. This is disclosed. It is not millions.
The UCL final in Budapest is May 30. This was your ticket. Your partner spent it.
Spirit went bankrupt owing billions. Your partner owes hundreds. History will be kind.
Trump tariffed EU cars at 25%. Your partner taxed your goodwill at 40%. Audit them.
PSG lead Bayern 5-4 heading into tomorrow. This debt is similarly unresolved.
The Baldoni-Lively settlement is confidential. This one is taped to the fridge.
Not the Iranian navy. But definitely blocking your access to shipping lanes.
Beyoncé showed up to the Met Gala. Your partner showed up to your savings account.
Arsenal went unbeaten in Europe all season. You've gone unpaid in this apartment.
The US is escorting ships through the Strait of Hormuz. You can't get a payment back.
Spirit took 17,000 jobs down with it. Your partner chose a more targeted approach.
Trump tariffed an entire continent. Your partner tariffed just you. More personal.
The Pentagon is redeploying troops from Germany. Your partner redeployed your savings.
